intro:
There is not much information available on the plant "Belvisia". However, I found that Belvisia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Costaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America.

Belvisia has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Belvisia include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Belvisia is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies such as cough syrups and expectorants.
